author: Pokémon 公式
text:
Pokémon GO Fest 2026: Chicago
Join presenters Gabby Snyder and Will “Speediest Chief” Dunphey for a memorable day covering the live-action excitement including games, an AR photo contest, a Shiny Pokémon search, a treasure hunt, and more. Level up your game by learning expert tips for improving your Pokémon GO battle skills. 

 Tune in to twitch.tv/Pokemon and twitch.tv/Pokemongo for at least 45 minutes on June 7, 2026, to earn the following Twitch Drops: 

1 Star Piece 
1 Lucky Egg 
50 Poké Balls 
50 Great Balls 
50 Ultra Balls 
1 Rare Candy XL 
1 Incense 

Championships Registration, Pairings, and General Info: https://pkmn.news/upcomingChampionships
2026 Season Regional Championships Schedule: https://pkmn.news/upcomingevents
Competitive News and Updates: https://x.com/playpokemon
#playpokemon

author: Pokémon 公式
text:
TCG Day 2 | 2026 Pokémon Turin Special Championships
Tune in to catch Day 2 of all of the TCG competition taking place at the 2026 Pokémon Turin Special Championships!

2026 Season Regional Championships Schedule: https://pkmn.news/upcomingevents
#playpokemon
